name: travelbudget-backend
description: Travel budget backend API using Node.js + Express + Neon Postgres + Clerk

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/db/pool.js && node --check src/lib/clerkAuth.js && node --check src/middlewares/auth.js && node --check src/services/tripService.js && node --check src/services/expenseService.js && node --check src/routes/trips.js && node --check src/routes/expenses.js && node --check src/middlewares/errorHandler.js && node --check src/middlewares/notFound.js
